titleStmt.title: SII 25.132: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 132. (A.R. No. 132 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the second prākāra of the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara Who assumed the title ‘emmaṇḍalamum-koṇḍaruḷiya’ Year 3[3] or [36]: 1301 or 1304 A.D.

summary.p: This record furnishes the details of date viz., Vaikāśi 10 which are however, not sufficient for verification. It may correspond to 1304 A.D., May 4, if the regnal year is taken as 36. The record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 14th Century.

It records a deed executed by the śrīkāryam of the deity Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār, the māḍāpattiyam Avimuttīśuram-uḍaiyāṉ, the śivabrāhmaṇas who had the right of worship for 30 days cycle and the tāṉattār to the Periyaṉāḻvāṇḍapiḷḷai, Kūttāṇḍap-periyanambi, etc., for the enjoyment of the rights, since there is a lapse in the thirtieth year of this king when the enjoyment of rights was withdrawn.
The above deed was attested by śrīkāryam-cheyvārgaḷ, māḍāpattiyam Avimuttīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ and a number of other individuals whose names are specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrīmeṟkittikku mel komāṟapaṉmarāṉa [ tribhuvaṉac] cakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamun koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulaśekhara devaṟku varuṣam 3 10 3 Āvatu vaikācimātam [10] tirunāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr periyāṉā
ḻ vāṇṭa piḷḷaiyaṟkum nampi brahmapirā ṟkum kūttāṇṭap periyanampikkum Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar cikāriyam ceyvārkaḷumāṭāpattiyama piḻu
tticara muṭaiyāṉum muppatu vaṭṭa tāṉattārum Āka Ivvaṉaivomum piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu muṉṉāḷ 3 10 ḷḷuvanāṭāḻvārāṉa nakaikkoṇṭu vantiru
ntu sabhaiyārum tāṉattārum pu ttāle Āḻvāṇṭa nampi celvaṉum nampāṉum taṅkaḷ kāṇi kalveṭṭu kaiyālum Ikkalveṭṭukku kāṅka
ṉ Erukācukuṭāmaiyālum muṉ ttai piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom muṉpecappaṭṭa Aṉaivaṟkkum taṅkaḷ kāṇi ti paṟṟi A[ nubhavittukkoḷvār] kaḷāka piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttom
Ivvaḷaiviṟkku Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarku tirukāriyañ ceyvārkaḷumāṭā pattiyam Avimuttiśvara muṭaiyāṉum muppatu tārum Āka Ivaṉai vomum . Ippaṭikku śrīkā
riyam perumāḷvaratar Eḻuttu ceṉaina Eḻuttu maāṭāpattiyam Avimuttiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu mutalpaṅkukku Amaiñca ra paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Iraṇṭām paṅku tillaiyāḷi
bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu muṉṟāmpaṅku nāṟpatteṇāyira 4 m paṅku triyambakar bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu 5 mpaṅku śivaṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ināḷil tevarkaṉmi Antarvveti paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Āyiratteḻunūṟṟuva vayirāki Eḻuttu Itu Ālāla cuntaravairāki Eḻuttu Amaṇārayaraṉuttapiḷḷai Eḻuttu tirupputtūr vairāki Eḻuttu śīmāheśvarappiḷḷai Eḻuttu ceyvāraṇappiḷḷai Eḻuttu
māheśvarappiḷḷai Eḻuttu śrī Avimutravayirāki Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
